title: Va Va En Devathaye Lyrics Abhiyum Naanum
stanzas:
va va en dhevaithiye
pon vaai pesum thaaragaiye
poi vazhvin pooraname
pen poove vaa...(2)

vaan midhakkum kangalukku
mayil iragaal mai idavaa
maarbudhaikkum kaalgalukku
mani kolusu naanidavaa

va va en dhevaithiye pon vaai pesum thaaragaiye
poi vazhvin pooraname
pen poove vaa..

selva magal azhugai pol
oru silrendra sangeetham
kaettathillai
pon magalin punnagai pol
yuga pookkalukku
punnagaikka theriyavillai

en pillai ettu vaithu
nadantha nadaiyai pol
andha ilakkana kavithaiyum
nadanthathillai.

muththukkal therikindra
mazhalai pol oru
munnooru mozhigalil
vaarthaigal illai.

va va en dhevaithiye pon vaai pesum thaaragaiye
poi vazhvin pooraname
pen poove vaa..

pillai nila palli sella
aval paiyyodu
en idhayam thudikka
kanden

sittraadai katti aval
siritha pothu
ennai petraval saayal
endru pesikonden

melnaatu aadai katti
nandatha pol ival
meesai illaatha
magal endru sonnen.

pen pillai thani arai
pugunthathile
oru pirivukku
oththigaiyai
paarthu konden.

va va en dhevaithiye pon vaai pesum thaaragaiye
poi vazhvin pooraname
pen poove vaa...(2)

vaan midhakkum kangalukku
mayil iragaal mai idavaa
maarbudhaikkum kaalgalukku
mani kolusu naanidavaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Va Va En Devathaye expresses deep love and admiration, portraying the beloved as a divine presence in the singer's life.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Abhiyum Naanum, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest, emphasizing the emotional bond they share.

Who is the singer and lyricist of the song?

The song is sung by Madhu Balakrishnan and the lyrics are penned by Raju Murugan.

When was the song released?

Va Va En Devathaye was released on December 19, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Va Va En Devathaye, the singer expresses profound love and admiration, portraying the beloved as a celestial being. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of romance and devotion, making it a standout track in the film Abhiyum Naanum. This song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love, evoking feelings of warmth and tenderness. It serves as a perfect backdrop for romantic occasions, resonating with anyone who has experienced the joys of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Va Va En Devathaye is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and devotion, beautifully rendered by Madhu Balakrishnan. This enchanting track from the film Abhiyum Naanum showcases heartfelt lyrics by Raju Murugan, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist. Experience the magic of this song that resonates with emotions and transports you to a world of bliss.
stanzaMeanings: Come, my goddess, the star that speaks with a golden mouth, come, the essence of life, come, flower of a girl...
For the eyes that see the sky, like a peacock, for the feet that dance to the rhythm, I am the anklet.
Come, my goddess, the star that speaks with a golden mouth, come, the essence of life, come, flower of a girl...
Like the tears of a wealthy daughter, there is no music that has been heard, like the smile of a golden daughter, the flowers of the era do not know how to bloom.
My child, like the way of walking, that ideal poem has not been created.
Like a child showing pearls, in three words, there are no words.
For the father, the mother is like nectar, when my sister is married, she will be in the embrace.
Come, my goddess, the star that speaks with a golden mouth, come, the essence of life, come, flower of a girl...
The child moon is selling, I saw my heart beat with her.
I saw the beauty of some gods sleeping in the goddess's sleep.
When she smiles, she ties the knot, I spoke as if she was my wife.
I said she is a girl without a mustache, like a girl from the highlands.
I looked at the separation in the entrance of the girl child.
Come, my goddess, the star that speaks with a golden mouth, come, the essence of life, come, flower of a girl...
For the eyes that see the sky, like a peacock, for the feet that dance to the rhythm, I am the anklet.
